# DIKLY

> DIKLY is an enterprise attendance and workforce/education management platform by DIKLY Technologies,
> built for academic institutions and corporate organizations. It combines verified attendance tracking
> (QR, Bluetooth/BLE hardware devices, GPS with anti-cheat), video meetings, quizzes with AI proctoring,
> HR tools (shifts, leave, timesheets), and AI-generated analytics in one system.
> Founder & CEO: Isaac Kweku Aryeepah. Website: https://dikly.sbs

## What DIKLY does

- Attendance: QR code, rotating code, ESP32 Bluetooth/WiFi classroom devices, and GPS-verified
  clock-in/out with anti-cheat safeguards (geofencing, mock-location detection, trust scoring).
- Meetings: built-in video meetings and lectures, including proctored exam sessions.
- Assessments: quizzes and SnapQuiz strict exam mode with AI proctoring (webcam analysis,
  violation detection, integrity reports), assignments, grade books, and exam timetables.
- Workforce (corporate mode): shifts, leave management, timesheets, team attendance,
  and ArrivalIQ — a traffic-aware smart commute assistant with departure reminders.
- Dikly AI: plain-language analytics reports on attendance trends, class/workforce health,
  and leave patterns. DIKLY never handles payroll or financial data.
- Communication: announcements, messaging, forums, and an AI FAQ assistant.

## Modes

- Academic: universities, colleges, and schools — students, lecturers, HODs, admins.
- Corporate: companies — employees, managers, admins. HR features without payroll/finance.

- Company: DIKLY Technologies

- Founder & CEO: Isaac Kweku Aryeepah (LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/isaac-aryeepah-bb7580378)
- Support: support@dikly.sbs
